payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT s.Name, s.Capacity FROM stadium s JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year >= '2014' GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;"}
